title: Birthday
description: A feature-rich Minecraft birthday plugin supporting birthday reminders, wish system, special effects, and prefix features.
body:
# Birthday Plugin

A feature-rich Minecraft birthday plugin supporting birthday reminders, wish system, special effects, and prefix features.

## Features

- 🎂 Player Birthday System
  - Players can only set birthday information once
  - Administrators can modify player birthdays
  - GUI interface for birthday settings
  
- 🎉 Birthday Celebration
  - Automatic player birthday detection
  - Server-wide announcements
  - Firework effects
  - Particle effects
  - Birthday prefix (requires LuckPerms)

- 🎁 Wish System
  - Players can send "Happy Birthday" to receive cake
  - One cake per player per day
  - Automatic wish record reset

- ⏰ Reminder System
  - Automatic upcoming birthday reminders
  - Configurable advance reminder days
  - Supports private/server-wide reminders

## Commands

- `/birthday set` - Set birthday information
- `/birthday check` - Check birthday information
- `/birthday modify` - Modify birthday information (requires permission)
- `/birthday reload` - Reload configuration (requires permission)

## Permissions

- `birthday.modify` - Allows modifying birthday information
- `birthday.admin` - Administrator permission, includes all permissions
